title: ocymastrum longiflorum
intro: Ocymastrum longiflorum, also known as the Long-flowered Sagebrush or Ocymastrum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Ocymastrum longiflorum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ocymastrum longiflorum can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding its flowers to make a powder for use in various medicinal applications.
